Learning Activities

Engage with interactive games to boost your French skills.

Flashcards

Master vocabulary with interactive flashcards

Match Words

Match English words to French

Match Images

Match images to French words

Spelling Practice

Improve your spelling accuracy

Targeted Spelling (SRS)

Progressive spelling practice tailored to your level

Gender Identifier

Practice masculine and feminine forms

Number Practice

Learn to count and use numbers

Clock Practice

Tell time in French

Pronunciation Practice

Practice your speaking and pronunciation
